name: DISC Status Election

eligibility.description: Requires a domestic corporation with one class of stock, minimum $2,500 capital, and shareholder consent. Election must be made during the 90-day period preceding the tax year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Election to be treated as a DISC to defer tax on export income or convert high-taxed ordinary income into lower-taxed dividend income for shareholders.
